ground_truth.title: You and your real life friends gotta go fight Giygas
ground_truth.author: TissueBox
ground_truth.main_content:
TissueBox
Mar 27, 2025

You and your closest real-life/online friends have been chosen by a twist of fate to prevent the world's demise, and are thusly sent on an adventure to accumulate the necessary Melodies/[insert mystical essence here]'s to put a stop to the great destroyer of universes, Giygas!

What's next?

And is the Earth in good hands?

Or, at the very least, are you going down partying? *raises glass*

As for moi -- our ragtag bunch will go in blazing, praying, and karakaoe-ing to Pollyanna, if nothin' else. ^^'

Poltergust
Mar 27, 2025

Do I unlock latent psychic powers throughout my journey?

Because if not then I'd rather just leave Earth to its fate lol.

BassForever
Mar 27, 2025

I can't comprehend the form of this threads attack

Manbig
Mar 27, 2025

My friends and I don't pray, so we're fucked.

y2kyle89
Mar 27, 2025

Man, I gotta solo Gigyas? Earth is doomed ;_;

CaveGhostPurp
Mar 27, 2025

I don't know Gigyas, but I know what a Gigas is

GreatOldOne
Mar 27, 2025

Poltergust said:
Do I unlock latent psychic powers throughout my journey?
Because if not then I'd rather just leave Earth to its fate lol.

You should find out as you go along. :)

Saikyo
Mar 27, 2025

We would waste like an hour trying to say his name.

poptire
Mar 27, 2025

Gotta say I am very much appreciating this forum's newfound Earthbound fondness

Having said that, Giygas would destroy us because we haven't gone on a journey across the world and touched the hearts of people who would help us spirit bomb him

super-famicom
Mar 27, 2025

Friends?

TissueBox
Mar 27, 2025

Saikyo said:
We would waste like an hour trying to say his name.

internet rabbit
Mar 27, 2025

we're done for

SilverArrow20XX
Mar 27, 2025

We'd find him, and then beat him up.
Cause we're grown ups and not a bunch of little kids.

brannigan
Mar 27, 2025

We haven't made enough friends around the world, so even with the most powerful prayers, we're all screwed.

AlgusUnderdunk
Mar 27, 2025

I'd sing him a lullaby then give his poor inconceivable ass some therapy.

Lbbaker
Mar 27, 2025

My friends and I would beat him to death with hammers

Stencil
Mar 27, 2025

I think I could do it, I got a buddy whos the son of a preacher he probably knows a prayer or two.

Professor Beef
Mar 27, 2025

I habe two roommates and we could easily wrangle a 4th friend, so yeah I'm down.

julia crawford
Mar 27, 2025

Real life?

zashga
Mar 27, 2025

Sorry in advance for letting everyone down. We had a good run.

Daddy JeanPi
Mar 27, 2025

I got different groups of friends, so i have a pretty varied roster of people to form a solid 4 man party. No matter who i choose, we're gonna get wiped out.

Nilson
Mar 27, 2025

honestly I feel like my friend group is built exactly for this

vid
Mar 27, 2025

Already did it, almost ten years ago now. Changed my life.

(Relevant timestamp at 21:49)

TissueBox
Mar 27, 2025

Hey guys! Looks like Giygas is back. Oh boy.

*packs up bags* How we looking this year at least?

vid
Mar 27, 2025

I'll be real with you, TissueBox - In the end, last year wasn't so great for defeating Giygas. 2026 isn't currently forecasting much better, but we've gotta keep doing our best.
